Generate Sparse Matrices Using Kronecker Products

Source: R/RcppExports.R
generateD.Rd

Generates a list of sparse matrices for differential operators in high-dimensional grids.

Arguments

Dim

Integer. The number of dimensions.

Ns

Integer. The grid size in each dimension.

Ds

Numeric. The grid spacing.

Value

A list of sparse matrices representing differential operators.

Examples

result <- generateD(3, 4, 0.5)
#> Error in getClass("dgCMatrix"): “dgCMatrix” is not a defined class
